series_metadata.series_description: Used to request installation or modification of any equipment or service provided by telephone, computer, copier companies, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Trash
